entryType: direct entry into open living area with central hallway access to private zones
kitchenLocation: front left corner with adjacent dining area, open to living room
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with 3 bedrooms clustered on bottom and 1 bedroom separated on top right
bathroomPlacement: back-to-back bathrooms sharing plumbing wall - one full bath centrally located, one full bath serving bedroom zone
efficiencyNotes: central hallway minimizes wasted corridor space

open concept public areas contrast with private bedroom wing
dimensionNotes: compact bedrooms averaging 9'-10' width, efficient use of 38'-6" x 31'-0" footprint, generous living area relative to bedroom sizes, bathrooms are compact but functional
